name: Steak and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into thin slices.
2. Pound the steak to a thickness of about 1/4-inch.
3. Combine flour, salt, pepper, and garlic or celery salt in a shallow dish.
4. Coat both sides of the steak with the seasoned flour mixture.
5. Allow the steak to stand for 5 minutes before cutting into serving pieces (8-10).
6. Heat butter in a large, heavy frying pan over moderate heat.
7. Brown the steak on both sides until golden brown.
8. Sprinkle chopped onion evenly over the steak.
9. Add beef bullion and bring mixture to a boil.
10. Cover the pan and simmer for 1 hour or until the steak is tender.
11. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese and chopped parsley over the top of the steak.
12. Cover again and cook for another minute or so to melt the cheese.
13. Serve hot with fluffy rice.
Good served with hot, fluffy rice.
